arts.ttl: Club have spoken to Oliver Glasner’s management – CEO knows Crystal Palace manager well
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have already spoken to Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner’s management ahead of a possible move in the summer. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who adds his information to the growing reports around Glasner and Leipzig. Reports over the last week have insisting that the Crystal Palace manager is on Leipzig’s list of The post Club have spoken to Oliver Glasner’s management – CEO knows Crystal Palace manager well appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Key Crystal Palace defender to miss Southampton clash - Oliver Glanser delivers team news
arts.sum: Richards – who featured for the US in their game against Canada over the international break – has played 17 times in the Premier League this season under Glasner. Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Chris Richards will miss Crystal Palace’s Premier League clash at Southampton.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed

arts.ttl: Glasner could fill Leipzig's vacant head coach role in summer, Sky reports
arts.sum: The Austrian manager could be set for a return to the Bundesliga in summer.

arts.ttl: Juric wants Southampton to avoid 'worst team' tag
arts.sum: Southampton manager Ivan Juric challenges his players to prove they are not "the worst team in the history of the Premier League".

arts.ttl: 'You will be surprised': Oliver Glasner says he has trialled Crystal Palace duo in new positions in training
'The goal is 30 points': Key quotes from Glasner's pre-Southampton press conference
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has challenged his Crystal Palace players to fully refocus on the Premier League after their FA Cup quarter-final win, with their next league assignment at Southampton on Wednesday, 2nd April (19:45 BST).

arts.ttl: Glasner’s pre-Southampton update on squad availability
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says defender Chris Richards is unavailable for Crystal Palace's trip to Southampton on Wednesday night (19:45 BST)

arts.ttl: How to watch & follow Palace at Southampton LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace will be hoping to extend their fine away form at Southampton this Wednesday, 2nd April (19:45 BST) – and here's how you can watch and follow the action LIVE!
